notes: Grand Hotel Kronenhof (Pontresina) & Kulm Hotel (St. Moritz) — luxury 5-star hotels in the Engadin (GR). Careers portal confirmed at careers.kronenhof.com/en/vacancies (live 2026-03-19). JSON API endpoint at /en/vacancies/json (standard ATS JSON suffix pattern; per original notes 'clean paginated JSON API'). HTML listing fallback: https://careers.kronenhof.com/en/vacancies
